form.formComment: At the last start finished 7th on March 31 over 410m at this track behind Paw Zevon beaten 9 lengths (24.23) in a Mix 3/4. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (30.25) when third at Richmond in a Grade 4/5. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from five starts. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 7 lengths over 400m at Geelong in a handy (22.58), beating Paw Harry. Will find this a bit tougher, prefer to watch at this stage.
